Accessibility Service permission: App Freezer requires the accessibility service permission in order to be able to close other apps.
Draw Over Apps permission: App Freezer requires the permission to draw above the other apps in order to be able to show the wait screen while closing apps.★

decoder_heading: This app is a great automated solution for users with physical disabilities and muscle fatigue, who struggle while interacting with the screen, especially when doing repetitive complicated tasks such as force closing many apps one by one.
ident_heading: This app is a great automated solution for users with physical disabilities and muscle fatigue, who struggle while interacting with the screen, especially when doing repetitive complicated tasks such as force closing many apps one by one.
heading_content_part: This app is a great automated solution for users with physical disabilities and muscle fatigue, who struggle while interacting with the screen, especially when doing repetitive complicated tasks such as force closing many apps one by one.

decoder_heading: This app automates one of the most repeating task with the user-interface, the task of "force closing running apps"! and It does so, by closing all the apps, one by one in an automated way, and hence helps disabled users avoid to manually close each app in the system settings.
